title: CompletionReconcileInput
description: INPUT of `completion_reconcile`: the raw agent verdict fields to normalize/reconcile into a completion_verdict (FAIL<->findings invariant + citation downgrade).

ticket_id.description: The canonical ticket id (for the verdict target).

runner.description: Runner id from the agent run.

model.description: Model id from the agent run.

trace_id.description: Trace id from the agent run.
